request.message: Integrated @pyrimid/sdk@0.2.6 using the embedded PyrimidResolver path. Added npm run pyrimid:integration, which fetches the Pyrimid catalog, recommends products from a natural-language need, computes affiliate/vendor/protocol split math with calculateSplit, records Base contract addresses from PYRIMID_ADDRESSES, and writes reproducible evidence to output/pyrimid-integration-demo.json. Build passed. Purchase step is documented as the next step once a funded Base USDC wallet is available.
